checks: Open Graph image referenced final image
Local desktop and mobile render checks passed without detected overflow

canibalization_check.notes: Existing perfume article covers how to choose perfumes and ambientadores; no existing article targets a BOFU listicle for mejores perfumes árabes para mujer.

serp_observations: Intent is commercial/BOFU: listicles, affiliate media, ecommerce listings and product-led pages dominate.
Top relevant pages emphasize rankings, viral Lattafa references, long-lasting/dulce modifiers and gift suitability.
Common gaps: little local buying context, weak cautions about blind buying, limited explanation by use case and few warnings about authenticity or over-applying intense scents.
Article structure chosen: direct answer, comparison table, seven-option listicle, buying checklist and FAQs.

runs.keyword: mejores perfumes de Dubai para mujer
runs.title: Mejores perfumes de Dubai para mujer: 7 opciones con criterio

canibalization_check.notes: Existing article targets generic 'mejores perfumes árabes para mujer'. This article narrows the intent to Dubai/UAE brands, exact Dubai framing, and purchase criteria for the Google ES / Calp-Alicante SERP. Slug and H1 are distinct.

serp_observations: Intent is commercial/BOFU: ranking pages, brand comparison guides and product fiches dominate results for Dubai/UAE women's perfumes.
Relevant top pages use listicle structures with 7-10 products, comparison tables, quick answers and notes/performance summaries.
Common entities include Lattafa, Afnan, Armaf, Yara, Opulent Dubai, Modest Deux, Rare, Club de Nuit Woman, Ajwad and Khamrah Qahwa.
SERP gaps: many pages blur Dubai vs UAE, overstate longevity or 'best' claims, and give weak cautions about blind buys, climate and counterfeit risk.
Chosen angle: seven-option BOFU comparison by use case, with precise brand-source notes and local Mediterranean buying cautions.
